case_title: KIMBERLY RENEE BOYD VS. WALGREEN CO.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - OUT OF STATE FOR AGENT OF SERVICE , SIGNED SERVED MAY-13-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WALGREEN CO.
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
